description: Canonical banner text snippets. Do not modify spacing or emoji. Each entry maps a variant name to its exact Markdown blockquote content.

standard.description: Default archival banner for tasks-first era documents
standard.trigger: Document describes tasks-first architecture without comparison or migration context
lines: > ⚠️ Historical Context
> This document describes Foreman's tasks-first architecture, which has been
> superseded by native task management (TRD-2026-006). Some instructions,
> configurations, or comparisons in this document may no longer reflect
> current behavior.

comparison.description: For feature-comparison documents that compare Foreman to external tools
comparison.trigger: Document compares Foreman to external tools (Overstory, Flywheel, etc.)
comparison.additionalLine: Comparisons to external tools (e.g. Overstory, Flywheel) reflect Foreman at a specific historical point and may be outdated.
lines: > ⚠️ Historical Context

> current behavior.
> Comparisons to external tools (e.g. Overstory, Flywheel) reflect Foreman at
> a specific historical point and may be outdated.

migration.description: For migration guides describing past transitions
migration.trigger: Document is a migration guide (tasks → native task store, or other historical migration)
migration.additionalLine: This migration guide is preserved for historical reference. See TRD-2026-006 for current task management architecture.
lines: > ⚠️ Historical Context

> This migration guide is preserved for historical reference. See TRD-2026-006
> for current task management architecture.

task-client-only.description: For documents describing the deprecated TaskClient era without coexistence fallback
task-client-only.trigger: Document describes TaskClient as the sole task backend (before FOREMAN_TASK_BACKEND coexistence)
task-client-only.additionalLine: The TaskClient is deprecated. See TRD-2026-019 for deprecation schedule.

placement.rationale: Blockquote format renders correctly in all Markdown viewers without custom CSS
